## [00:00 - 01:50]

Welcome to Module 8. This is the Evergreen launch. So, like the JV launch, this isn't where you're going to start out. This isn't going to be your first launch, but basically with the Evergreen launch, that's where you take your internal launch, all the work you did for your internal launch or your JV launch, and you turn it to a launch that works for you every single day. So, you have new leads coming into your business all year long. If you're only doing one launch a year, you don't want those leads sitting around waiting for a year to go through a launch. So, the way you do the Evergreen launch is you build a system, and it's all done with technology. It can be simple or it could be complicated, but basically as new leads come into your business, then shortly after they join your list, you send them through an Evergreen launch. Now, the great news about this is you can take the launch you've already done, the internal launch you've already done, and leverage that launch. You basically just reuse that launch. Nevertheless, this is an advanced strategy. It's not generally where you want to start out with the product launch formula. So, it's a great strategy. This is a game changer for me, because what you do in my business, I've seen it, but we've seen it in other people's businesses as well, other PLF owners' businesses, is what you do is you even out your cash flow. So, it's not like you're going all year long with no cash flow from your launch, it's also you have one spike up for your one launch, or two spikes up for your two launches. What you do is you even out your cash flow, and that just makes everything work a lot better, because now you're not just depending on those revenue spikes. So, it's a great strategy. It's an advanced strategy. It's not your first launch, but it's super powerful. So, scroll down, leave a comment, let me know you're here, and let me know what you're going to do with your Evergreen launch.
